_comment: Doc-budget thresholds — issue #231 / PRD FR14j amendment (2026-04-25). Single source of truth: ralph.py _build_doc_budget_block AND tools/check-ralph-doc-budget.sh BOTH read this file. Edit values via PR with sizes.jsonl evidence (≥20 healthy iters, P90 ≥30% below cap, FP <5%) before promoting Phase 2 to halt-in-prompt mode.
